programme.title: Swindlers
programme.sub-title: Custom House Capital: A House of Cards
programme.desc: The Custom House Capital scandal, one of Irelands most notorious investment frauds, which involved the systematic misappropriation of approximately 61 million euros in client funds. The fallout left more than 2,000 investors, many of whom were retirees, facing devastating financial losses. This documentary allows many of them to tell their stories about how their trust was breached, leaving them facing retirement with just a fraction of their life savings

programme.desc: Hugh Wallace, Amanda Bone and Siobhán Lam visit three more shortlisted homes hoping for a shot at the title. programme.desc: Bonhams auctions a collection of letters written by Jackie Kennedy that she sent to British diplomat David Ormsby-Gore shortly after being widowed

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Examining intriguing and valuable pieces passing through the worlds auction houses

programme.title: Pavarotti in the Park
programme.desc: A celebration of Pavarottis 30th year as a tenor, in which he performed 20 arias, including O Sole Mio and Nessun Dorma, during an open-air recital in Hyde Park in 1991

programme.title: The Joy of Painting
programme.desc: In the space of just half an hour, Bob Ross breaks down how to create a brown-toned mountain scene on canvas

programme.title: The Joy of Painting
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses all of his skill and experience to paint a tranquil landscape setting nestled at the base of a towering mountain

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man on holiday in the West Indies become involved in a bizarre bet with a stranger. Starring Pamela Stephenson, Jose Ferrer and Michael Ontkean

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: Mrs Bixby and the Colonels Coat
programme.desc: An unfaithful wife receives a mink coat from her lover - and must explain the gift to her husbands satisfaction. Starring Richard Greene, Julie Harris and Michael Hordern

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man kills his wife and buries her in the basement before leaving for America, where he receives messages telling him the murder will be exposed

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Worried that their Aunt Rosalie does not really like them, brothers Paul and Henri set out to get their hands on her fortune any way they can. With Hurd Hatfield and Mildred Natwick

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Robert Wise, who won Oscars for The Sound of Music and West Side Story and also directed The Day the Earth Stood Still and The Andromeda Strain

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the American actor, the star of Ghostbusters and Groundhog Day who earned an Oscar nomination for his role in Lost in Translation

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: By persuading a surgeon to perform a macabre experiment, a man continues to dominate his wife after his death. Elaine Stritch and Marius Goring star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When her policeman husband Patrick callously announces that he is leaving her, Mary Marney strikes out and kills him with the frozen leg of lamb she has bought for their dinner. When attending the scene, officers are unable to determine nor find the murder weapon. Susan George and Brian Blessed star

programme.title: Classic FMs Rising Stars with Julian Lloyd Webber 2021
programme.desc: A showcase for five young classical musicians, featuring violinist Esther Abrami, trumpeter Lucienne Renaudin Vary, violinist Randall Goosby, guitarist Sean Shibe and pianist and cellist Jeneba Kanneh-Mason

programme.title: Battle of the Bagpipes
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the world of piping, lifting the lid on its traditions, culture and star players as they compete for the ultimate piping prize of being the lone piper at the Royal Military Tattoo. The opening edition follows National Piping Centre musical director Finlay Macdonald and a number of Scotlands leading pipers at celebratory international festival Piping Live

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Alan J Pakula, who directed films including Klute, The Parallax View, All the Presidents Men, Sophies Choice and Presumed Innocent

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the actor who rose to fame in Sergio Leones Spaghetti Westerns and won Oscars for directing Unforgiven and Million Dollar Baby

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A landlady appears kind and friendly - but her last two guests disappeared two years ago. Siobhan McKenna and Leonard Preston star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A woman is cut down to size by her husbands loyal butler when it is discovered she is having an affair. Drama, starring John Gielgud, Joan Collins and Peter Bowles

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Dishonest Frank and Lorna Bramwell visit the home of wealthy, eccentric Monica Laughton with the intention of robbing her

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Recently deceased writer Alexander Penn Arlington gets permission from the recording angel to relive his last day on Earth so that he can find out who murdered him

programme.title: Stories from the National Gallery
programme.desc: Kate Bryan concludes her journey through the gallerys 200-year history with a look at the Turner bequest, before exploring the impressionist works by Van Gogh, Monet and Seurat

programme.title: Liza Minnelli: Hollywoods Golden Child
programme.desc: A profile of the actress and singer, with archive footage and interviews revealing her triumphs, struggles with addiction and resilient spirit

programme.title: Glenn Close: A Feminist Force
programme.desc: A profile of the actress, who is known for playing women fighting for equality, both in their vulnerability and in their ability to rise again

programme.title: Paul McCartney and Wings: One Hand Clapping
programme.desc: Documentary filmed over four days at Abbey Road Studios in 1974, revealing the inner workings of the band and featuring performances of Maybe Im Amazed, Jet and Live and Let Die

programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Jim Moir, Jessie Cave, Jordan Stephens, Rose Matafeo, Caryn Franklin and Tomasz Shafernacker head to the picturesque town of Whitstable to showcase their artistic flair

programme.title: Landscape Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Stephen Mangan presents highlights of the 11th series of the competition in which artists were challenged to capture the views at locations around the UK

programme.title: The Warhol Effect
programme.desc: Documentary lifting the lid on the fascinating last decade of Andy Warhols life and the artistic legacy he left, featuring rare archive footage and interviews with insiders

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: In the wake of the showdown, the members of the now-disbanded Task Force continue to seek answers. As the Dark Hearts mobilise to cover their tracks, a shocking revelation leads them to a final confrontation

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrions fate is decided as his champion Oberyn Martell faces against Gregor the Mountain Clegane in his trial by combat, while Moles Town is on the receiving end of a raid by the wildlings. Ramsay sends Theon into Moat Cailin to negotiate the surrender of the Ironborn troops holding the fort, Littlefinger and Sansa are questioned about the circumstances surrounding Lysas death and Barristan confronts Jorah about a document delivered to him. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The men of the Nights Watch face their biggest challenge yet as they prepare to defend the Wall and Castle Black against attacks from the north and south by Mance Rayders wildling army, with Ygritte determined to be the one to kill Jon Snow. Sam gets some sage advice about love from Maester Aemon and is shocked when someone comes knocking at the gates seeking shelter. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington and directed by Neil Marshall, the man behind the second series episode depicting the Battle of the Blackwater

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: After meeting at the cornhole party, Clark quickly hits it off with Floyds wife Carol. Later, detectives Homer and Plumb dig deeper into Clarks relationship with Carol, and Floyds time on the DTF app

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon Snow heads into the wildling camp to try to negotiate a peace with Mance Rayder, but an unexpected arrival changes the situation at the Wall, while Daenerys is forced to make a decision about the dragons in Meereen. Cersei demands that Tywin call off her engagement to Loras Tyrell, Bran learns more about his destiny, and Tyrion receives a visit from Jaime as he awaits his fate. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard try to impress American guests at Carlton Towers with a programme of traditional activities, including skinning rabbits and taking high tea. Meanwhile, Sir Humphry Wakefield entertains tourists on a wine-tasting weekend at Chillingham Castle

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Everyday life at Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, where the members of staff try to tactfully deal with the whims of their employer, baronet Humphry Wakefield, as the estate prepares to welcome a band of ghost-hunting tourists. Meanwhile, Carlton Towers in East Yorkshire hosts an annual dog show for Afghan hounds

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Pauls Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Carmela and Fr Phil share an intimate moment. Meanwhile, family business interrupts Meadows interview tour of Maine colleges as Tony spies an old acquaintance at a petrol station. Drama, starring James Gandolfini, Lorraine Bracco and Jamie Lynn-Sigler

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Junior is now officially boss of the DiMeo crime family, but his decisions are proving unpopular with his nephews crew. Tony has a temporary impotence problem as a result of taking anti-depressants, much to the consternation of Carmela and his mistress Irina. Drama, starring James Gandolfini, Lorraine Bracco and Oksana Babiy

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a tragedy, George agrees to help Bertha, and a visit has a lasting impact on the staff of Russell house

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: It is Easter morning 1883 and Bertha Russell receives news that her bid for a box at the Academy of Music has been rejected. The return of the period drama, starring Carrie Coon and Louisa Jacobson

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: Peggy gets welcomed back to 61st Street by almost everyone, while George informs Oscar of his decision and sends Clay to meet with union leader Mr Henderson at his steel mill

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, the day of King Joffreys wedding to Margaery Tyrell arrives, and while the sadistic monarch delights in tormenting his uncle Tyrion, the capitals various factions plot further alliances. However, all attention is drawn back to Joffrey following the arrival of a pie filled with live birds. Meanwhile, Melisandre oversees a sacrifice to the Lord of Light at Dragonstone as three traitors are burned at the stake, and the future continues to look grim for Theon as Ramsay Snow finds a use for him. North of the Wall, Bran sees clearly where he and his friends must go after experiencing a series of visions

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Ser Dontos spirits Sansa out of Kings Landing and rows her out to a waiting ship, and Pod gives Tyrion news of his forthcoming trial. Tywin counsels Tommen on what makes a good king and also has an offer for Oberyn Martell. Sam decides Castle Black is not a safe places for Gilly, while Jon proposes a bold plan after the wildlings send a chilling message. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys picks a champion to take on the best that Meereen has to offer and Davos has an idea about raising funds for Stanniss cause

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: After meeting at the cornhole party, Clark quickly hits it off with Floyds wife Carol. Later, detectives Homer and Plumb dig deeper into Clarks relationship with Carol, and Floyds time on the DTF app

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: As Detective Alcaras investigates Milos disappearance, Marissa and Jenny work to raise awareness and a press conference turns ugly. Mystery thriller starring Sarah Snook

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Following his lover Brandons murder, Omar is determined to help the police bring Barksdale to justice and agrees to testify in the Gant trial. Meanwhile, Major Rawls puts pressure on Bunk to make arrests in the three unsolved cases he is investigating, forcing McNulty, Greggs and Freamon to ask Daniels for more time and preserve the wiretap on the Barksdale crew

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Sookie struggles with her emotions when the serial killer strikes close to home. Jason finds the urge for vampire blood hard to bear, eventually lashing out at his sister in his lowest moment. Elsewhere, Sam and Tara find comfort in each others loneliness. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin, Stephen Moyer and Ryan Kwanten

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion is sent out to welcome a royal party from Dorne outside the walls of Kings Landing, and Jon Snow finds himself on trial at Castle Black over his time with the wildlings and the death of Qhorin Halfhand. Daenerys heads toward the slave city of Meereen, and Arya runs into a familiar face. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, the day of King Joffreys wedding to Margaery Tyrell arrives, and while the sadistic monarch delights in tormenting his uncle Tyrion, the capitals various factions plot further alliances. However, all attention is drawn back to Joffrey following the arrival of a pie filled with live birds. programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Ser Dontos spirits Sansa out of Kings Landing and rows her out to a waiting ship, and Pod gives Tyrion news of his forthcoming trial. Tywin counsels Tommen on what makes a good king and also has an offer for Oberyn Martell. Sam decides Castle Black is not a safe places for Gilly, while Jon proposes a bold plan after the wildlings send a chilling message. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys picks a champion to take on the best that Meereen has to offer and Davos has an idea about raising funds for Stanniss cause

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: April returns to Pauls office, where she reveals her chemotherapy seems to be working - but this good news has left her questioning her own identity. She announces that she wants to stop her sessions with Paul and sever all ties with her old life, so the therapist tries to assure her that her future could be brighter than she thinks. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne and Alison Pill

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their sons birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: AJ is called into the principals office with his parents when he turns up drunk at the gym, having stolen the church sacramental wine. Tony turns to Dr Melfi for assurance that his son is not doomed, and reminisces about his own childhood. Drama, starring James Gandolfini and Lorraine Bracco

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Rumours of an FBI clampdown on the New York underworld prompt Tony and his associates to do a little house-cleaning - and his mother Livia unwittingly ends up with all manner of cash, guns and stolen jewellery hidden in her room at Green Groves

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the attack on Pearl Harbour, US marine sergeant John Basilone prepares to confront Japanese forces somewhere in the Pacific. Meanwhile, Robert Leckie has his first taste of combat on Guadalcanal, while privileged Eugene Sledge longs to join the war. Fact-based Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale, Joseph Mazzello and Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sgt Basilone arrives in Guadalcanal, and quickly earns the respect of his comrades for his leadership and valour in a series of skirmishes. However, a naval bombardment leads to several casualties - and when it is followed by a major assault on the airfield, Basilone and his men are pushed to the limits of their endurance as they try to defend their territory. Second World War drama, starring Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The American soldiers arrive in Melbourne following their ordeal at Guadalcanal, and are greeted as heroes by the Australian public. Leckie falls for a local woman, and Basilone is honoured for his bravery in battle - but discovers that his new-found fame back home has an unexpected downside. Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Leckie and his comrades arrive on the island of New Britain, where they try to repel a concerted Japanese attack - but adjusting to the jungle terrain and battling illness prove to be their greatest challenges. After clashing with his commanding officer, Leckie witnesses a horrifying sight, and soon finds himself struggling to retain his sanity. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US marines, starring James Badge Dale

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sledge leaves America to join the forces in the South Pacific - and has a harrowing introduction to combat when he participates in the assault on Peleliu. Back home, Basilone tours America to promote the war bonds programme. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US marines, starring Joseph Mazzello and Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The marines have to deal with dehydration and nerves as they prepare to launch an attack on Peleliu airfield. A risky manoeuvre places the entire company in danger, and Sledge realises that he is still far from accustomed to the brutal realities of war - while Leckie is forced to risk his life to retrieve vital supplies. Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The ongoing conflict on Peleliu takes its toll on Sledge as the Japanese soldiers dig into their positions, forcing the Americans to pick them off one by one, and he nearly succumbs to joining his comrades in their hunt for macabre trophies. Back in the US, Basilone becomes disillusioned with his role selling war bonds and longs to rejoin his comrades in the Pacific. War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: A restless Basilone is assigned to train new recruits after urging the army to give him a more active role, but finds himself becoming surprisingly close to a female sergeant at his new base. However, the pair are driven apart when he is called on to lead his trainees into battle on Iwo Jima. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US Marines who served in the conflict, starring Jon Seda and Annie Parisse

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sledges division is sent to assist the attack on a fortified position in Okinawa. As they struggle through the muddy landscape, they encounter horrific evidence of the conflicts impact on Japanese civilians, and struggle to reconcile their duties with the suffering of the regions people. Second World War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The Marines return home following the Japanese surrender, but a demoralised Sledge struggles to cope with the horrors he saw during the campaign. Leckies relationship with his parents deteriorates, and Lena meets Basilones family for the first time. Conclusion of the Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Jaime finally visits Tyrion in jail after some persuasion from Bronn, and he also has a mission for Brienne. Daenerys tries to balance justice and mercy in Meereen. At Castle Black, Jon asks for volunteers when Ser Alliser decides to let him go to Crasters Keep to deal with the mutineers. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Kit Harrington

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov draws up a plan, but it comes with great risks. Meanwhile, Lyudmilla ignores warnings about her firefighter husbands contamination

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov and Boris Shcherbina come up with a life-saving idea to remove radioactive debris. Elsewhere, Ulana faces problems as she investigates the explosion

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue pursues a new business venture as she helps forge a friendship between Jules and Elliot. Maddy considers getting back together with Nate

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.sub-title: You Who Cannot See, Think of Those Who Can
programme.desc: After bailing on his weekly hook-up with Cassie, Nate and Maddy finally speak face to face. Jules and Elliot spend more time together

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue continues her downward spiral, and tensions with her family escalate when her recent behaviour is brought to light. Starring Zendaya and Hunter Schafer

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Tipped off by the wire, Greggs, Herc, Carver and Freamon intercept a drugs resupply in Franklin Terrace. Their success makes Avon and Stringer suspicious, leading them to rip out the payphones and close shop in the Pit. Bunk and McNulty trace another eyewitness to the Gant murder and ask Omar for help in tracking down their suspect

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, the day of King Joffreys wedding to Margaery Tyrell arrives, and while the sadistic monarch delights in tormenting his uncle Tyrion, the capitals various factions plot further alliances. However, all attention is drawn back to Joffrey following the arrival of a pie filled with live birds. Meanwhile, Melisandre oversees a sacrifice to the Lord of Light at Dragonstone as three traitors are burned at the stake, and the future continues to look grim for Theon as Ramsay Snow finds a use for him. North of the Wall, Bran sees clearly where he and his friends must go after experiencing a series of visions

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Ser Dontos spirits Sansa out of Kings Landing and rows her out to a waiting ship, and Pod gives Tyrion news of his forthcoming trial. Tywin counsels Tommen on what makes a good king and also has an offer for Oberyn Martell. Sam decides Castle Black is not a safe places for Gilly, while Jon proposes a bold plan after the wildlings send a chilling message. Across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys picks a champion to take on the best that Meereen has to offer and Davos has an idea about raising funds for Stanniss cause

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: April returns to Pauls office, where she reveals her chemotherapy seems to be working - but this good news has left her questioning her own identity. She announces that she wants to stop her sessions with Paul and sever all ties with her old life, so the therapist tries to assure her that her future could be brighter than she thinks. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne and Alison Pill

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard, the owners of Carlton Towers near Selby in North Yorkshire, prepare to host a fitness boot camp weekend at their property - while also welcoming an array of guests to celebrate their sons birthday. Meanwhile, Sir Benjamin Slade hopes a murder mystery weekend at Maunsel House in Somerset will help pay off a sizeable electricity bill

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: AJ is called into the principals office with his parents when he turns up drunk at the gym, having stolen the church sacramental wine. Tony turns to Dr Melfi for assurance that his son is not doomed, and reminisces about his own childhood. Drama, starring James Gandolfini and Lorraine Bracco

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Rumours of an FBI clampdown on the New York underworld prompt Tony and his associates to do a little house-cleaning - and his mother Livia unwittingly ends up with all manner of cash, guns and stolen jewellery hidden in her room at Green Groves

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the attack on Pearl Harbour, US marine sergeant John Basilone prepares to confront Japanese forces somewhere in the Pacific. Meanwhile, Robert Leckie has his first taste of combat on Guadalcanal, while privileged Eugene Sledge longs to join the war. Fact-based Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale, Joseph Mazzello and Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sgt Basilone arrives in Guadalcanal, and quickly earns the respect of his comrades for his leadership and valour in a series of skirmishes. However, a naval bombardment leads to several casualties - and when it is followed by a major assault on the airfield, Basilone and his men are pushed to the limits of their endurance as they try to defend their territory. Second World War drama, starring Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The American soldiers arrive in Melbourne following their ordeal at Guadalcanal, and are greeted as heroes by the Australian public. Leckie falls for a local woman, and Basilone is honoured for his bravery in battle - but discovers that his new-found fame back home has an unexpected downside. Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Leckie and his comrades arrive on the island of New Britain, where they try to repel a concerted Japanese attack - but adjusting to the jungle terrain and battling illness prove to be their greatest challenges. After clashing with his commanding officer, Leckie witnesses a horrifying sight, and soon finds himself struggling to retain his sanity. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US marines, starring James Badge Dale

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sledge leaves America to join the forces in the South Pacific - and has a harrowing introduction to combat when he participates in the assault on Peleliu. Back home, Basilone tours America to promote the war bonds programme. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US marines, starring Joseph Mazzello and Jon Seda

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The marines have to deal with dehydration and nerves as they prepare to launch an attack on Peleliu airfield. A risky manoeuvre places the entire company in danger, and Sledge realises that he is still far from accustomed to the brutal realities of war - while Leckie is forced to risk his life to retrieve vital supplies. Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The ongoing conflict on Peleliu takes its toll on Sledge as the Japanese soldiers dig into their positions, forcing the Americans to pick them off one by one, and he nearly succumbs to joining his comrades in their hunt for macabre trophies. Back in the US, Basilone becomes disillusioned with his role selling war bonds and longs to rejoin his comrades in the Pacific. War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: A restless Basilone is assigned to train new recruits after urging the army to give him a more active role, but finds himself becoming surprisingly close to a female sergeant at his new base. However, the pair are driven apart when he is called on to lead his trainees into battle on Iwo Jima. Second World War drama, based on the memoirs of US Marines who served in the conflict, starring Jon Seda and Annie Parisse

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sledges division is sent to assist the attack on a fortified position in Okinawa. As they struggle through the muddy landscape, they encounter horrific evidence of the conflicts impact on Japanese civilians, and struggle to reconcile their duties with the suffering of the regions people. Second World War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The Marines return home following the Japanese surrender, but a demoralised Sledge struggles to cope with the horrors he saw during the campaign. Leckies relationship with his parents deteriorates, and Lena meets Basilones family for the first time. Conclusion of the Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Jaime finally visits Tyrion in jail after some persuasion from Bronn, and he also has a mission for Brienne. Daenerys tries to balance justice and mercy in Meereen. At Castle Black, Jon asks for volunteers when Ser Alliser decides to let him go to Crasters Keep to deal with the mutineers. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Kit Harrington

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov draws up a plan, but it comes with great risks. Meanwhile, Lyudmilla ignores warnings about her firefighter husbands contamination

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov and Boris Shcherbina come up with a life-saving idea to remove radioactive debris. Elsewhere, Ulana faces problems as she investigates the explosion

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue pursues a new business venture as she helps forge a friendship between Jules and Elliot. Maddy considers getting back together with Nate

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.sub-title: You Who Cannot See, Think of Those Who Can
programme.desc: After bailing on his weekly hook-up with Cassie, Nate and Maddy finally speak face to face. Jules and Elliot spend more time together

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue continues her downward spiral, and tensions with her family escalate when her recent behaviour is brought to light. Starring Zendaya and Hunter Schafer

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Tipped off by the wire, Greggs, Herc, Carver and Freamon intercept a drugs resupply in Franklin Terrace. Their success makes Avon and Stringer suspicious, leading them to rip out the payphones and close shop in the Pit. Bunk and McNulty trace another eyewitness to the Gant murder and ask Omar for help in tracking down their suspect

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Jaime finally visits Tyrion in jail after some persuasion from Bronn, and he also has a mission for Brienne. Daenerys tries to balance justice and mercy in Meereen. At Castle Black, Jon asks for volunteers when Ser Alliser decides to let him go to Crasters Keep to deal with the mutineers. Fantasy drama, starring Emilia Clarke, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Kit Harrington

programme.title: The Blind Side (2009)
programme.desc: A middle-class family take in a hulking homeless teenager, who has no education or skills to speak of. The indomitable wife encourages him to turn his life around, helping him to get the grades he needs for a college scholarship and hone his sporting skills to become an American football player. Fact-based drama, starring an Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock alongside Quinton Aaron and Tim McGraw

programme.title: I, Tonya (2017)
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespies comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance

programme.title: Mamma Mia! (2008)
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughters wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan, Julie Walters, Colin Firth, Stellan Skarsgard and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: The Blind Side (2009)
programme.desc: A middle-class family take in a hulking homeless teenager, who has no education or skills to speak of. The indomitable wife encourages him to turn his life around, helping him to get the grades he needs for a college scholarship and hone his sporting skills to become an American football player. Fact-based drama, starring an Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock alongside Quinton Aaron and Tim McGraw

programme.title: Wicked (2024)
programme.desc: Green-skinned Elphaba Thropp becomes part of the new intake at Shiz University, and shares a room with fellow spell-caster Galinda Upland. Its the beginning of a friendship which culminates in an epic showdown as Elphaba transforms a renegade witch with a skill for bursting into show-stopping songs, like Defying Gravity. Part one of The Wizard of Oz prequel based on the hit stage musical, starring Cynthia Erivo, Ariana Grande-Butera, Jonathan Bailey, Michelle Yeoh and Jeff Goldblum

programme.title: Love Actually (2003)
programme.desc: Ten interlinked stories of people searching for and finding love. While the newly elected, bachelor British prime minister is smitten by a junior staff member at 10 Downing Street, a heartbroken writer heads for France to get over a failed relationship, and a faded rock star aims to reinvent himself in time for Christmas. Richard Curtiss romantic comedy, with Hugh Grant, Martine McCutcheon, Emma Thompson, Alan Rickman, Colin Firth, Bill Nighy and Liam Neeson

programme.title: I, Tonya (2017)
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespies comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance

programme.title: Yesterday (2019)
programme.desc: Jack, a struggling musician, gets hit by a bus during a mysterious event. When he regains consciousness, he finds that he is the only person who can remember the Beatles, and sets out to exploit the opportunity by passing their hits off as his own compositions. Danny Boyles comedy, starring Himesh Patel and Lily James

programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mothers heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes (2009)
programme.desc: The eccentric detective and his confidant Dr Watson investigate the apparent resurrection of a criminal mastermind with links to the occult, who is carrying out a series of seemingly magical murders. The case is complicated by the reappearance of Holmes duplicitous old flame Irene Adler. Action thriller, starring Robert Downey Jr, Jude Law, Rachel McAdams, Mark Strong and Eddie Marsan

programme.title: Blade Runner (1982)
programme.desc: A former cop in a bleak future Los Angeles is forced to return to duty for a mission to hunt down and kill a group of renegade android replicants. The fugitives have escaped from a space colony to find their creator on Earth, in a bid to prolong their limited lifespan. Theatrical cut of Ridley Scotts sci-fi thriller, originally released in cinemas, starring Harrison Ford, Rutger Hauer, Sean Young and Daryl Hannah

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon (1975)
programme.desc: Hapless Sonny and his sidekick Sal have a plan to rob a Brooklyn bank. The novice crooks thought they would be in and out in 10 minutes, but instead find themselves stuck in an ongoing hostage situation, with the police and the media laying siege to the bank. Sidney Lumets fact-based drama, starring Al Pacino, John Cazale and Charles Durning.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky (2001)
programme.desc: The laid-back lifestyle of an arrogant New York playboy is shattered when his unstable girlfriend drives off a bridge with him in the car. Although he survives, he struggles to put his life back together in the face of a series of strange events. Cameron Crowes remake of Spanish thriller Open Your Eyes, starring Tom Cruise, Cameron Diaz, Kurt Russell, Jason Lee and Penelope Cruz, who also appeared in the original

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal (1973)
programme.desc: A group of conspirators contracts the Jackal, a professional hitman, to assassinate President Charles de Gaulle of France. The killer starts to put his painstaking plans into action, creating a new identity, establishing his alibi and commissioning a custom-made weapon, while out-foxing the French police at every turn. Fred Zinnemanns adaptation of Fredericks Forsyth thriller, with Edward Fox, Michael Lonsdale, Alan Badel, Tony Britton and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: Ghostbusters (1984)
programme.desc: Three eccentric scientists put their hi-tech gadgetry and knowledge of the paranormal to money-making use by setting up in business as freelance ghost catchers. A musician calls them in to investigate when she sees strange creatures in her kitchen, only to end up possessed. As the spook-hunting team members deal with an attempt to shut their operation down, they discover an evil demonic entity is being summoned into existence and it falls to them to stop this creature from destroying the world. Supernatural comedy adventure, starring Bill Murray, Dan Aykroyd, Harold Ramis, Sigourney Weaver, Ernie Hudson and Rick Moranis

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes (2009)
programme.desc: The eccentric detective and his confidant Dr Watson investigate the apparent resurrection of a criminal mastermind with links to the occult, who is carrying out a series of seemingly magical murders. The case is complicated by the reappearance of Holmes duplicitous old flame Irene Adler. Action thriller, starring Robert Downey Jr, Jude Law, Rachel McAdams, Mark Strong and Eddie Marsan

programme.title: Vanilla Sky (2001)
programme.desc: The laid-back lifestyle of an arrogant New York playboy is shattered when his unstable girlfriend drives off a bridge with him in the car. Although he survives, he struggles to put his life back together in the face of a series of strange events. Cameron Crowes remake of Spanish thriller Open Your Eyes, starring Tom Cruise, Cameron Diaz, Kurt Russell, Jason Lee and Penelope Cruz, who also appeared in the original

programme.title: Oceans Eleven (2001)
programme.desc: A suave ex-convict assembles a gang of sophisticated crooks to pull off a daring heist. He intends to rob three of Las Vegass biggest casinos simultaneously - and also win back his estranged wife, who is now dating the ruthless owner of all three gambling establishments. Steven Soderberghs crime comedy, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Matt Damon and Bernie Mac

programme.title: Nosferatu (2024)
programme.desc: In 1838 Germany, Thomas Hutter is sent to the Carpathian mountains to secure the signature of enigmatic nobleman Count Orlok on a property sale in the German city of Wisborg. Thomas leaves his bride Ellen in the care of friend Friedrich Harding and his wife Anna. The young man barely survives the exhausting trip to Europe and stumbles home to find Ellen driven to delirium by a telepathic bond to the Count. Director Robert Eggers version of the Dracula-inspired horror, starring Bill Skarsgard, Lily-Rose Depp, Nicholas Hoult and Aaron Taylor-Johnson

programme.title: Get Out (2017)
programme.desc: After African American photographer Chris and his white girlfriend Rose visit her wealthy parents, he suspects theres more to the locals than meets the eye. Oscar-winning psychological thriller written and directed by Jordan Peele (Us), starring Daniel Kaluuya, Allison Williams, Bradley Whitford and Caleb Landry Jones

programme.title: The Perfect Storm (2000)
programme.desc: The skipper of a fishing boat and his crew ignore severe weather warnings and head for a dangerous area of the North Atlantic in search of the last lucrative catch of the season, but end up fighting for survival in the worst storm of the 20th century. Fact-based disaster drama, with George Clooney, Mark Wahlberg, Diane Lane, John C Reilly and Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall (1994)
programme.desc: A retired army colonel has raised his three sons alone on their remote Montana ranch. But the all-male household is thrown into turmoil when the youngest son brings home his beautiful fiancee, causing jealousy and tensions that culminate in tragedy. Edward Zwicks period drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Brad Pitt, Aidan Quinn, Julia Ormond and Henry Thomas

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer (2025)
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders

programme.title: King Ivory (2024)
programme.desc: Tulsa narcotics cop Layne West is locked in a battle with the citys criminal underworld. When his son becomes addicted to fentanyl, West teams up with his partner Ty and FBI agent Beatty to bring down those responsible. Thriller, starring James Badge Dale and Ben Foster

programme.title: The Cinema List: Brit Hit
programme.desc: Celebrating the best of British. Featuring classics like Snatch and Bridget Jones. Expect iconic performances and a uniquely British blend of humour and heart

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: One More Shot (2025)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer (2025)
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2025)
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler

Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.desc: A couples holiday is upended when theyre forced to share a mansion with a mysterious couple, spiralling into a maze of sex, lies and manipulation. Comedy thriller, starring Alex Roe and Maddie Hasson

programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: Murdered at First Sight
programme.sub-title: Death at the Door: Ron Browning
programme.desc: A bizarre home invasion in 2015 that left 69-year-old pastor Ron Browning dead after he opened his door to 19-year-old Camille Brown, who savagely attacked him

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The discovery of two bodies at a home in the Bedfordshire village of Hockliffe and how the subsequent investigation led police to uncover a crime driven by pure greed

programme.title: The Real CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Rapper XXXTentacions murder at 20-years-old shook hip-hop. Investigators used forensics to uncover motives behind killing

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of Judy Buenoano, the first woman in Florida to die in the electric chair. She was a killer so evil that her own son became one of her victims

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: The cops step in when a reckless teens speeding ends badly and a caravan loses a part at the top of the Lindis Pass

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Documentary series which follows a rapid response team of police officers as they tackle crime

programme.title: Send in the Dogs
programme.desc: PC Rogers reveals how he and Alsatian Leo help clear the streets of car thieves, and the officer comes up against a man who threatens to shoot him as the Greater Manchester Police dog squad tackles more criminals. A drunk driver takes on PC Greaves and his sidekick Riley, while spaniel Colin - who is trained to deal with explosives - and PC Carlin are put on the front line when a member of the Cabinet arrives in the city. Ken Stott narrates

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Documentary series which follows a rapid response team of police officers as they tackle crime

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: A breakdown in the fast lane spell trouble for the traffic officers, and a rush-hour rollover threatens a horse trainers hopes of making it to the big race

programme.title: Stop, Search, Seize
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Irelands border force officers as they fight to stop gangs of organised smugglers from bringing drugs, money, guns, cars and even exotic animals into the country

programme.title: Police 24/7

programme.desc: Examining the execution of German spies captured in the two world wars. Theres a profile of suffragette Leonora Cohen, who took aim at the crown jewels to publicise her cause. Theres a look back to 2014, when the Tower hosted a display of nearly 900,000 ceramic poppies in the moat for Remembrance Day. In the Royal Armouries after dark, curator Bridget examines a telling reminder of the horrors of war. Plus, another new recruit joins the Beefeaters

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A bizarre trend happened in Ireland in the 1980s when thousands of people started seeing religious statues move. Some residents of a village reported seeing a statue of the Virgin Mary move. Others believed the phenomenon was just an optical illusion or a prank

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: According to folklore, pots of gold and wishes are granted if a Leprechaun is caught. These mysterious little creatures are seemingly only found in Ireland. Alleged sightings of leprechauns and fairies are nothing new in Ireland. In fact, many claim they are part of everyday life on the Emerald Isle. Experts debate whether these Celtic creatures are fact or fiction

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Discovering the fate of the holiday industry in a post-apocalyptic world, with luxury resorts and cruise ships falling apart

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring anomalies appearing on satellite images to try and get a better understanding of unexplained phenomena

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: A fresh look at the Third Reich from a global and current perspective, telling how the Nazis conquered Germany and then half of Europe within a few years of losing the First World War. This first episode recounts how the clash of right-wing and left-wing political convictions turned the Weimar Republic into a powder keg. The fascist movement then seized power in Italy in 1922

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Veterans and historians tell the story of the Thai-Burma railway and the countless prisoners of war and slave labourers who died building it

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the north Norfolk coast through one of the least developed spots in Britain, finding out how the area maintained its rural, remote identity despite the dynamic industrial changes of the Victorian age. From the arrival of Bertie, Prince of Wales at Sandringham House to the opening of Cromer Pier, Tonys four-day walk sees him learn about key periods in the countys history. He explores prime shooting estates, purpose-built seaside resorts, salt marshes and disused railway lines as he discovers how powerful landowners were able to control development and even shape the railways to suit their needs

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained

programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists attempt to piece together the lives behind discovered bones, and find out what happened to these people and how they died. In the first edition, five bodies dating from the Bronze Age are found in a deep pit on the Isle of Thanet in Kent. programme.title: Cracking the Code

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britains most historic landscapes. The moors and valleys of West Yorkshire were the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontës, the literary family who produced such classics as Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre. Over four days, Tony heads out from the Victorian wool capital of Bradford and treks in a giant loop around what is now known as Brontë Country. From the birth of Charlotte, Emily, Anne and their brother Branwell in the suburb of Thornton, he traces their childhoods to the much-romanticised Brontë hub of Haworth, finding that the harsh reality of life in the 1820s was far removed from the fantasy world dreamed up by the children at their fathers parsonage home

programme.desc: The Cambodian Civil War, which was contested between 1967 and 1975. programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.sub-title: New Zealand and the Bass Strait
programme.desc: Untold stories of UFO sightings, abductions, and other paranormal events. The Bass Strait is a treacherous stretch of water that separates Tasmania from the Australian mainland. This episode documents the disappearance of pilot Frederick Valentich and his Cessna in the region. His last transmission gave a disturbing account of what the young pilot experienced

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: A visit to Queenslands farming country, where lush rain-drenched crops meet the Great Barrier Reef. UFO activity in the region has led to the suggestion as to whether there might be a link between water and such sightings

programme.desc: Lisa is forced to stop when the unrelenting road knocks her engine apart, and Todd attempts an ambitious bush fix to muscle his load back onto the trailer. Meanwhile, rookie Scooter gets creative to squeeze his wide load down the narrow winter roads

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts joins archaeologists on digs of northern Britain, revealing a Roman Emperors lost bath house, the sunken treasures of medieval pilgrims and a formidable fortress perched on top of a Scottish mountain

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards takes an aerial and up-close view of some of the UKs most awe-inspiring castles. Beginning at Fyvie Castle in Scotland, Rick meets Annie Robertson, who faces the task of saving the childhood home of Charles I from collapse

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to the south-east of England to explore the turbulent history of Dover Castle. He reveals that Henry II ordered its construction not only as a statement of royal power, but also out of guilt for the murder of Thomas Becket, the Archbishop of Canterbury, in 1170. Dan discovers how a vast network of tunnels was used to defend the castle, including underground barracks built during the Napoleonic Wars and a nuclear bunker created during the Cold War

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the turbulent history of the Tower of London, which is one of Britains most famous buildings and has been a military fortress, a palace, a royal mint, a prison, a zoo and a place of execution. He reveals how one kings obsession with money led to the Tower becoming the focus of the worst Jewish massacre the country had ever seen and explains how a mob of disgruntled peasants managed to break through its defences as they sought bloody revenge for taxes they could no longer put up with

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Warwick Castle, which started as a motte and bailey fort established by William the Conqueror in 1068 and was transformed into a stone fortress two centuries later by the Beauchamp family. He examines the role Guy Beauchamp played in the kidnapping and murder of one of Edward IIs closest allies and descends into the castles claustrophobic dungeon

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones heads to Gwynedd to explore the history of Caernarfon Castle, the building of which began in 1283 on the orders of Edward I. He demonstrates how the castles vast stone walls and strategically designed towers repelled all enemies, even the Welsh national hero Owain Glyndwr, earning itself a truly forbidding reputation, but its military importance faded at the end of the 15th century when Henry Tudor - a Welshman - made his way on to the English throne

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe takes a trip down memory lane as he explores the thrilling legacy of stuntman Evel Knievel. programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. Alice also meets the team examining one of the largest discoveries of Roman coins ever made in Britain, and hears about a mystery in Dorset

programme.title: WW2 Air Crash Detectives
programme.sub-title: Lost and Confused: Sharp Top Mountain B25 Crash
programme.desc: Garth Barnard investigates how thousands of soldiers during the Second World War died in catastrophic air accidents and tragic training crashes. In the first edition, he tries to uncover what happened on board a B-25 Mitchell Bomber that crashed into Sharp Top mountain in Virginia in 1943, resulting in the deaths of five people

programme.title: WW2 Air Crash Detectives
programme.desc: The documentary concludes with a look at a 1943 crash in Gibraltar, which killed General Wladyslaw Sikorski, the Prime Minister of Polands London-based government. Presenter Garth Barnard investigates many of the unanswered questions from the tragedy, including why the pilot was wearing a life jacket and why many of the bodies believed to be on the plane were never found, and asks whether the accident could have actually been an assassination

programme.desc: Garth Barnard investigates the Bakers Creek aviation disaster in Australia in 1943, when 40 American servicemen were killed when their B-17 bomber aircraft crashed

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Galapagos
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the Galapagos, a collection of volcanic islands in the Pacific known for its extraordinary wildlife. More than 150 years after Charles Darwin formulated his ground-breaking theory of evolution on the remote archipelago, Attenborough explains how life on the islands has continued to evolve in biological isolation, examining how the ever-changing volcanic landscape has given birth to species and sub-species that exist nowhere else in the world. He begins by revealing how Galapagos rose from the ocean four million years ago

programme.title: The First Wives Club (1996)
programme.desc: Three former college friends reunite at the funeral of a mutual acquaintance, who killed herself after her husband left her for a younger woman. Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth Berkley

programme.title: Jackie (2016)
programme.desc: Following the assassination of her husband, President John F Kennedy, Jacqueline Kennedy battles with grief and trauma to regain her faith, console her children, and define JFKs legacy. Director Pablo Larrains Bafta-winning drama, starring Natalie Portman, Peter Sarsgaard and Greta Gerwig. Mica Levi provided the Oscar-nominated score

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby (2024)
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby, and his dying mother Gwen. Helens life is a grind, but she has a chance at romance when a secret love returns. Writer/director Janis Pughs drama, starring Louise Brealey and Annabel Scholey

programme.title: Rampage (2018)
programme.desc: When three different animals become infected with a dangerous pathogen, a primatologist and a geneticist team up to stop them from destroying Chicago. Fantasy adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Naomie Harris and Malin Akerman

programme.title: Street Fighter (1994)
programme.desc: A military officer goes in search of a power-mad general who is holding several hostages in a secret location. He soon finds he is not the only one on the maniacs trail, and joins forced with a mismatched band of martial artists to save the captives. Action adventure based on the video game, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Raul Julia, Kylie Minogue and Ming-Na Wen

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes (2024)
programme.desc: A battle-hardened special forces operative attempts to rescue his kidnapped niece when a mercenary mission spirals into chaos. Action thriller, starring Eden Brolin, Andy Garcia and Melissa Leo

programme.title: Hero (2002)
programme.desc: A warlord in ancient China sends out messengers throughout his kingdom to declare a reward for whoever can kill three assassins intent on murdering him. In response, a warrior arrives at the rulers palace and claims that he has already defeated the would-be killers, but his story does not quite ring true. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li, Tony Leung Chiu Wai and Maggie Cheung Man-Yuk. In Mandarin

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw (2019)
programme.desc: Hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless mercenary Deckard Shaw have spent years trying to take each other down. But the mismatched heroes must put their differences aside and team up when a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist gains control of an insidious bio-threat that could alter humanity forever. Action adventure spin-off, starring Dwayne Johnson, Jason Statham, Idris Elba and Helen Mirren

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage (2017)
programme.desc: The extreme sports-loving super spy is brought out of exile when a lethal gang of mercenaries steal a powerful new weapon that threatens the safety of the entire world. He must assemble his own team of adrenaline junkie agents to recover the lethal device. Action thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Donnie Yen, Toni Collette and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: I Am Legend (2007)
programme.desc: A Manhattan-based military scientist finds himself immune to a virus that turns humans into ferocious vampire-like creatures. After the disease has swept across the world, wiping out an estimated 90 per cent of the human population, he devotes his solitary existence to finding a cure by unlocking the secret within his blood. Sci-fi thriller, starring Will Smith, Alice Braga and Charlie Tahan

programme.title: Bad Boys II (2003)
programme.desc: Two mismatched undercover cops set out to halt an underground gang war and bring down a drug lord attempting to flood the market with a deadly form of Ecstasy. However, a romantic interlude threatens to drive the investigation off course. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Will Smith, Martin Lawrence, Gabrielle Union, Jordi Molla and Peter Stormare

programme.title: Waterworld (1995)
programme.desc: In the future, environmental disasters have left the planet flooded. A web-footed mutant mariner helps a woman and an orphan girl search for a mythical haven of dry land, with the help of a map tattooed on the childs back - but in the process has to fend off a villainous crew of nicotine-addicted pirates. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kevin Costner, Dennis Hopper, Jeanne Tripplehorn, Tina Majorino and Rick Aviles

programme.title: Sudden Death (1995)
programme.desc: Terrorists seize control of an ice-hockey stadium in the middle of a match attended by the US vice president. Taking the politician hostage, they threaten to blow up the building at the final whistle - but a resourceful former fireman takes it upon himself to thwart their dastardly plot. Action thriller, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Powers Boothe, Raymond J Barry and Whittni Wright

programme.title: Hero (2002)
programme.desc: A warlord in ancient China sends out messengers throughout his kingdom to declare a reward for whoever can kill three assassins intent on murdering him. In response, a warrior arrives at the rulers palace and claims that he has already defeated the would-be killers, but his story does not quite ring true. Martial arts adventure, starring Jet Li, Tony Leung Chiu Wai and Maggie Cheung Man-Yuk. In Mandarin

programme.title: Vendetta (2022)
programme.desc: When his daughter is brutally murdered and legal justice looks unlikely, William Duncan takes the law into his own hands, setting out on a quest for retribution. After killing the street thug who was directly responsible for her death, he finds himself in the middle of a war with the dead mans brother, who is equally hell-bent on getting even. Action thriller, starring Bruce Willis and Thomas Jane

programme.title: Street Fighter (1994)
programme.desc: A military officer goes in search of a power-mad general who is holding several hostages in a secret location. He soon finds he is not the only one on the maniacs trail, and joins forced with a mismatched band of martial artists to save the captives. Action adventure based on the video game, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Raul Julia, Kylie Minogue and Ming-Na Wen

programme.title: The Beekeeper (2024)
programme.desc: An apparently unassuming man finds someone very important to him has been scammed and driven to harm. Revealed as a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as Beekeepers, he sets out on a brutal quest of vengeance, hunting those responsible for the incident, who have seriously underestimated how much of a threat he is. Action thriller, starring Jason Statham, Jeremy Irons, Minnie Driver and Jemma Redgrave

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage (2017)
programme.desc: The extreme sports-loving super spy is brought out of exile when a lethal gang of mercenaries steal a powerful new weapon that threatens the safety of the entire world. programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw (2019)

Action adventure spin-off, starring Dwayne Johnson, Jason Statham, Idris Elba and Helen Mirren

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning (2025)
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt is in exile with both halves of the 3D cruciform key that can unlock the source code of rogue AI creation, the Entity. Hunt returns to London to reunite with Luther Stickell, Benji Dunn and former thief Grace. The Entitys human henchman, Gabriel, is still on the loose, so Hunt bolsters his ranks with vengeful French assassin Paris and US intelligence agent Theo Degas. Action thriller, starring Tom Cruise, Hayley Atwell, Ving Rhames, Simon Pegg and Esai Morales

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3 (1992)
programme.desc: As Murtagh counts down his last few days on the force before retirement, he and Riggs go on the trail of a former LAPD officer who is using his insider knowledge to steal confiscated weaponry and ammunition, then selling it on to criminal gang bosses. The duo are assigned to work with internal affairs investigator Lorna Cole, while they also get help from old friend - and reformed small-time crook - Leo Getz. Action thriller sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci and Rene Russo

programme.title: Enter the Dragon (1973)
programme.desc: A powerful crime kingpin hosts a martial arts tournament on his island lair. A former Shaolin monk is recruited by an intelligence agency to enter the tournament and expose the crime lords opium and slavery rings. He finds himself fighting for his life alongside two Vietnam veterans who are both fleeing their own enemies. Thriller, starring Bruce Lee, John Saxon, Jim Kelly and Kien Shih

programme.title: The Running Man (1987)
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot is framed for the murder of starving civilians - and ends up being forced to take part in a brutal TV game show in which a succession of gadget-wielding killers hunt him on the streets of Los Angeles. Sci-fi action adventure inspired by a Stephen King story, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Yaphet Kotto, Maria Conchita Alonso and Richard Dawson

programme.title: The Leftovers
programme.desc: With the clock ticking towards the anniversary of the Departure, Kevin Sr wanders the Australian Outback in an effort to save the world from apocalypse

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Part one of two. Worf learns his father was not killed in a battle 25 years ago, as he had previously thought, but was taken to a distant Romulan penal colony. Meanwhile, Data experiences disturbing visions. Sci-fi adventure, starring Michael Dorn and Brent Spiner

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.sub-title: Wrongs Darker Than Death or Night
programme.desc: Kira travels back in time to discover the truth about her mother, only to find herself in a Bajoran refugee camp at the beck and call of a group of lustful Cardassian officers. Starring Nana Visitor

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: The team stumbles upon the stately-home wedding of ex-ARC member Jenny Lewis while investigating an anomaly. As the bride tries to keep her past hidden from her fiance, she finds herself reliving her old role by helping her former colleagues fight a family of hyaenadons that wreaks havoc at the ceremony. Meanwhile, Beckers life becomes endangered as the hunt for Ethan continues. Hannah Spearritt, Andrew-Lee Potts and Lucy Brown star

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: ARC tackles a carnivorous terrorbird at a prison tourist attraction after an anomaly opens, which also results in the unexpected reappearance of Danny, who has a warning for the unit. programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the work of Britains emergency helicopter medical services. programme.desc: Paul Murton boards the Jacobite steam train to make one of the worlds most famous railways journeys, with his route starting at the foot of Ben Nevis in Fort William and continuing along to Mallaig and onwards to the Isle of Skye. For centuries, outsiders had seldom visited the beautiful landscape of the west coast, but then the power of steam changed everything and within a century, a network of railways spread across the entire country, connecting the industrial cities of the south to the mountains and glens of the north

programme.desc: Fifteen miles west of Galway city along the shore of Galway Bay lies the townland of An Lochán Beag. Síle Nic Chonaonaigh finds a resilient and confident community still very much connected to its local landscape. She meets with a local beekeeper creating a safe habitat for our native bees, she meets a young and informative family along the shoreline and heads out into the bay in a curragh with a local mother and daughter. Before Síle leaves, she learns of a local tragedy from 1917 that remains very much in the thoughts of locals to this day

programme.title: Bailte
programme.desc: Fifteen miles west of Galway city along the shore of Galway Bay lies the townland of An Lochán Beag. Síle Nic Chonaonaigh finds a resilient and confident community still very much connected to its local landscape. She meets with a local beekeeper creating a safe habitat for our native bees, she meets a young and informative family along the shoreline and heads out into the bay in a curragh with a local mother and daughter. Before Síle leaves, she learns of a local tragedy from 1917 that remains very much in the thoughts of locals to this day

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Fate presents Molly with an opportunity after she finds one of her former fourth-grade students homeless and pregnant

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Dolomite, Apple Slices and a Mystery Woman
programme.desc: Sheldon makes friends with an upper-class senior pupil who introduces him to a new field of science. Meanwhile, Mary and George disagree on how to handle Sheldons blossoming social life

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Killer Asteroids, Oklahoma and a Frizzy Hair Machine
programme.desc: A disappointing lack of success in a competition at the school science fair sends Sheldons life in a new direction as he rejects the idea of becoming a scientist in favour of acting. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Sheldon is bullied by an unlikely character, Mary and George disagree on how to handle the situation, contemplating whether they should their son employ self-defence techniques. Undeterred, he tries his hand at jiu-jitsu and even covers himself in bubble-wrap for protection

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard worries his lack of American football knowledge is alienating him from Penny and her friends. However, he finds an unlikely sporting tutor in the form of Sheldon, who reluctantly spent most of his childhood attending games with his father. Meanwhile, Raj is infuriated when Howard abandons him to pursue a girl at a kite-fighting contest

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howards fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Meanwhile, Kripke plays a prank during a radio interview with Sheldon, who sets out to get revenge, only to be caught by the Dean. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonards mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj lusts after a girl he and Sheldon meet at a university party, and Leonard comes to regret airing his disapproval of Pennys belief in psychics. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldons flat is burgled, so they work on a state-of-the-art security system in a bid to outwit any future would-be thieves. However, their plans go awry when they ensnare Penny in a net. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon develops a mental block and has difficulty working on a formula, so in a move inspired by Albert Einstein he gets a job at the Cheesecake Factory diner to try to revive his creativity - and despite Pennys objections, proves surprisingly effective in the role. Guest starring Yeardley Smith (The voice of Lisa Simpson)

programme.title: The Rocky Mountain Mortician Murder
programme.desc: A beloved funeral directors murder exposes several shocking suspects, including his grandson, handyman, and two local celebrity brothers

programme.title: The Rocky Mountain Mortician Murder
programme.desc: Investigators expose secrets about the brothers, including a secret affair. The revelation sparks a rageful confession - and causes another death

programme.title: The Rocky Mountain Mortician Murder

programme.sub-title: A Mother, a Child and a Blue Mans Backside
